title: Conceptual Art
definition: Art where ideas and process outweigh material form.

title: Performance Art
definition: Live actions as artistic medium with social and political meaning.

title: Installation Art
definition: Site-specific spatial environments activating audience participation.

title: Relational Aesthetics
definition: Art theory focused on inter-human relations and social exchanges.

title: Institutional Critique
definition: Practices examining museums, power, funding and cultural structures.

title: Social Practice
definition: Collaborative community-based art with civic goals.

title: Participatory Art
definition: Projects where audiences co-create the artwork.

title: Archive as Practice
definition: Artistic use of records, memory and documentation systems.
